narrative: An AI Engineer with seven years' experience at Vedantu, a product‑focused ed‑tech firm, currently based in Berlin. His strong verified skill depth, especially in TensorFlow and scikit‑learn, lifted his ranking. He has hands‑on experience with LlamaIndex and Milvus, both key components for building search and retrieval pipelines, and his background in machine learning aligns with the role’s core responsibilities. However, his location in Berlin and unknown notice period reduce his availability for a Pune/Noida position, and minor credibility concerns temper confidence.
